headline: Pfizer Announces Positive Topline Phase 2 Results for Next-Generation CDK4 Inhibitor, Atirmociclib, in Second-Line Metastatic Breast Cancer
summary: NEW YORK, March 17, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced positive topline results from the randomized Phase 2 FOURLIGHT-1 study evaluating atirmociclib in combination with fulvestrant, versus fulvestrant or everolimus plus exemestane, in people with hormone receptor (HR)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2-negative (HER2-) advanced or metastatic breast cancer (MBC) who had received prior cyclin-dependent kinase (CDK) 4/6 inhibitor-based treatment. headline: Empire Metals, Atlantic Lithium, ImmuPharma, IP Group, Light Science Technologies, ATOME
summary: Empire Metals Ltd (AIM:EEE, OTCQX:EPMLF) says new drilling confirms a high-grade zone at its Pitfield titanium project in Australia. A bigger drill campaign is underway, with an updated resource expected in the third quarter. Atlantic Lithium Ltd (AIM:ALL, ASX:A11, OTCID:ALLIF) has secured around $16 million to push its Ewoyaa project in Ghana forward. The funding brings in local pension funds and supports key milestones toward production. ImmuPharma PLC (AIM:IMM, FRA:25I) is raising up to £7.5 million to develop a new Type 1 diabetes treatment. It also says a licensing deal for its lead drug remains on track this year. IP Group PLC (LSE:IPO) returned to growth last year with NAV per share up 13% after a tough 2024. The boost came from Pfizer’s Metsera deal and ongoing portfolio exits. Light Science Technologies Holdings PLC (AIM:LST, FRA:9FD) raised £600,000 in a retail offer that was heavily oversubscribed. Total fundraising now stands at £6.6 million. ATOME PLC (AIM:ATOM) has earned an “Excellent” rating for its green finance framework. That supports its low-carbon Villeta fertiliser project in Paraguay backed by a $420 million debt deal. Follow us and subscribe on YouTube, our social channels and on proactiveinvestors.co.uk.
